steps.targetDesc: the **Finder icon** — blue smiley face at the far-left of the Dock at the bottom of the screen
steps.expectedState: Finder window opens and Finder becomes the active application
steps.why: Finder is the macOS file manager; launching it is required before navigating files
steps.pitfall: Do not confuse it with other Dock icons; Finder is always the leftmost icon and cannot be removed from the Dock
